{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|seo}}
{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|infobox}}

[[File:<%~ it.showcase %>|thumb|left|400px|<%~ it.name %>]]
{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|description}}
<div style="clear:both"></div>
<% if (it.statsSection) { %>
== Stats ==
{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|stats}}
<% } -%>
<% if (it.unlocksSection) { %>
== Level Unlocks ==
{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|unlocks}}
<% } -%>
<% if (it.upgradesSection) { %>
== Upgrades ==
{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|upgrades}}
<% } -%>
<% if (it.skinsSection) { %>
== Skin Upgrades ==
{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|skins}}
<% } -%>

{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|categories}}
